title: wolfhsm_cmac: missing wc_CmacFree leaks AES key material on stack
description: shims.c wolfhsm_cmac() calls wc_InitCmac + wh_Client_Cmac but never calls wc_CmacFree(). The Cmac struct is stack-allocated and contains the AES key schedule (cmac.aes.devKey). Without wc_CmacFree(), key material is not zeroed and remains on the stack until overwritten by normal execution. Fix: call wc_CmacFree(&cmac) before each return path.
